# AirportFYI Embed Widget

> 4,500+ airports, IATA/ICAO codes. Embeddable widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation.

## Quick Start

```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/airportfyi-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>
<div data-airportfyi="entity" data-slug="example"></div>
```

## Available Widget Types (3)

- entity: `data-airportfyi="entity"`
- glossary: `data-airportfyi="glossary"`
- search: `data-airportfyi="search"`

## Customization

- **Themes**: light, dark, sepia, auto (follows system preference)
- **Sizes**: compact (280px), default (420px), large (720px)
- **Styles**: modern, classic

```html
<div data-airportfyi="entity" data-slug="example"
     data-theme="auto" data-size="compact" data-style-variant="modern"></div>
```

## Integration Methods

1. **Script tag** (recommended): `<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/airportfyi-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>`
2. **iframe**: `https://airportfyi.com/iframe/entity/{slug}/`
3. **oEmbed**: `https://airportfyi.com/oembed?url={page_url}&format=json`
4. **Badge**: `https://airportfyi.com/badge/site.svg`

## Links

- Main site: https://airportfyi.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.airportfyi.com
- API documentation: https://airportfyi.com/developers/
- npm package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/airportfyi-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/fyipedia/airportfyi-embed

- [AirlineFYI Widget](https://widget.airlinefyi.com)
- [PlaneFYI Widget](https://widget.planefyi.com)
- [TrainFYI Widget](https://widget.trainfyi.com)
